description:
The Intruder BEFORE he became a visitor. (4 ALT SCENARIOS!)

I havenвҖҷt actually seen anyone make a bot of The Intruder before he turned into a visitor so I thought itвҖҷd be a cool little bot to make! HONESTLY I THINK HE WAS PROBABLY LIKE A BIG NERD IN PHILOSOPHY AND PSYCHOLOGY

If yвҖҷall want more of him though let me know and IвҖҷll consider possibly making more soon!

There are 4 alternate scenarios!

1st message: HeвҖҷs at your door begging to be let in. You get to decide and go from there.
